{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220122152441175E87A8485A0EE0"}"},"total":5577},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6892572690851790848","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是我看到最好的一本氪金系统小说。值得推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1604802145,"group_id":"6886732760199728135","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"奢求少一点，幸福多一点！期望低一点，成功高一点！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4coIMIxfw/fWA+UgDiUXdwI4pQriPt76CCWN5NluW7F","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/45f64d46e63c47628cf7dd4aa3446c39~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776708106&x-signature=sFt29csf%2FEimgQi16TIOIPajP8E%3D","user_id":"3166222332997759","user_name":"唔来嘛来嘛"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3166222332997759","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6886732760199728135","book_info":{"abstract":"【超爽玄幻】“叮！第一项功能激活，开启自动修炼，修炼速度等于超级妖孽！”“叮！功能升级，修炼速度翻倍，功能再升级，修炼速度再翻倍！”“叮！第二项功能激活，开启自动习武......”“叮！第三项功能激活......”修炼很难？不好意思我修炼一天等于你修炼几十年！练功很难？不好意思我什么都不干就能轻松学会无数功法！炼丹很难？不好意思我丹药吃不完都快生霉了！......苏浪穿越后获得一键修炼系统，每秒都在变强！从现在开始，吊打一切，天下无仇！PS:觉得本书字数尚少的同学，可以看看本人上一本书《神级共享男友系统》哦！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/97b6168ffaf9fce0ed1ffac47afa2945","author":"D猫","author_id":"","book_id":"6886732760199728135","book_name":"一键修炼系统瞬间百万级","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema t":"阅读180小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":339041,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":647868,"reply_count":8,"show_pv":48754},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"6897116361982574600","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"hallo~
我是作者D猫。
啪的一下很快啊，我上来就是一个滑跪！
感谢大家点开我的书，感谢大家阅读我的书！
这是一本无脑玄幻爽文，节奏畅爽不憋屈，当然逻辑和细节会有所欠缺，还请读者大大们见谅，然......爽就完事儿了~
那啥，我超喜欢看书评，章评，段评的，超好看的，我每次都笑得停不下来。
所以请读者大大们尽情发挥，我每天都会看看有没有新的。
最后双手合十，头比手低，求一个五星好评，感谢大家支持！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1605860047,"group_id":"6886732760199728135","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"大家好，我是D猫，三年写作的萌新，创作方向是玄幻，仙侠","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3Tg4VGmk+jxikDEypOGxDqn8x+i/Qwo011cPDzUE196","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/632b120453a9464bbbfa28c0d21b66fb~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706490&x-signature=DTAbhFx9fXvCx6Gi69YW5cBlCQ4%3D","user_id":"1525756677602237","user_name":"D猫"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1525756677602237","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6886732760199728135","book_info":{"abstract":"【超爽玄幻】“叮！第一项功能激活，开启自动修炼，修炼速度等于超级妖孽！”“叮！功能升级，修炼速度翻倍，功能再升级，修炼速度再翻倍！”“叮！第二项功能激活，开启自动习武......”“叮！第三项功能激活......”修炼很难？不好意思我修炼一天等于你修炼几十年！练功很难？不好意思我什么都不干就能轻松学会无数功法！炼丹很难？不好意思我丹药吃不完都快生霉了！......苏浪穿越后获得一键修炼系统，每秒都在变强！从现在开始，吊打一切，天下无仇！PS:觉得本书字数尚少的同学，可以看看本人上一本书《神级共享男友系统》哦！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/97b6168ffaf9fce0ed1ffac47afa2945","author":"D猫","author_id":"","book_id":"6886732760199728135","book_name":"一键修炼系统瞬间百万级","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"
